channel.title: aksys on Últimas ofertas en consolas y gaming
channel.description: Recent content in aksys on Últimas ofertas en consolas y gaming

item.title: AKSYS - Virche Evermore -Error: Salvation- Standard Edition Nintendo Switch
item.description: Tienes AKSYS - Virche Evermore -Error: Salvation- Standard Edition Nintendo Switch en el siguiente enlace! ℹ️: The system that was created—a “memory download” - is where the body that dies by age 23 is discarded, and only the memories live on. Those who live forever through memory download are known as “relivers” and continue to resist their short lives. In order to combat the rapidly shrinking population, the powers that be managed to create a super technological advancement that allowed them to clone someone’s memory and body in the process called “ReLife”.
